patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed toggling Mesa’s Regulators on and off and instantly switching to your Melee resulting in ability to use them freely without any Energy cost or restrictions.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Regulators name not appearing in the HUD when ranking up.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Upgrade screen breaking for Garuda's Talons and Mesa's Regulators if you click the Mods button and back out.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed inability to see Mesa/Mesa Prime’s Regulators on other players in the Dojo/Relay.
Fixed inability to see Mesa/Mesa Prime’s Regulators in the Simulacrum Arsenal as a Client.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Pax Seeker activating on Warframe Exalted Ability Weapons (i.e. Titania Razorwing, Mesa Regulators).

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed ability to unintentionally equip Hydraulic Crosshairs and Sharpened Bullets on Mesa’s Regulators. Although the buff appeared to trigger, it never actually applied due to the "on aim" criteria not being fulfilled (unless you had a very specific loadout with the Mesa Waltz Augment equipped).

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes:
Mesa’s Regulators 
If you own or purchase the Mesa Presidio Skin, you will automatically receive the  Presidio Regulators skin to equip onto Mesa’s Regulators.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa's Regulators not receiving pistol upgrades for missions where you start in Archwing (Uranus).

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed/improved the death FX on surveillance drones (Regulators).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: Multishot Secondary Mods are now properly inherited with Mesa’s Peacemaker. For added clarity, only non-weapon specific Secondary Mods scale with Peacemaker. We are still reviewing this for results to see if it needs scaling back in terms of sheer damage output. Please note that Regulators base damage was reduced in 18.13.1 to compensate for Multishot inheriting damage potential.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Grineer Regulators with Scorpions on Phobos Missions.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Grineer Regulators spawning in Settlement Interception missions which could cause potential progression stoppers.
